name: hangman
description: This task will require you to create a web based game of [Hangman](<https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hangman_(game)>) using JavaScript. This will require understanding of: - Arrays - Iterators - DOM maniuplation - Event Listeners - String maniuplation There are images provided for each stage of the eleven guesses, but feel free to use your own if you like. There is a word list provided, feel free to modify it as you see fit.
